feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: No dues alert not triggering
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has the following ask.

There are few Contributors for No dues workflow. When the separation of the employee will get initiated, No dues alert will get trigger to the Contributors & in Home Page they will be able to view the Alert to initiate the No dues for the particular employees.

We have tried to achieve the same through Alert but no alert is getting triggered. Is there any feasibility on the same?

entry.title: Fiscal Year date format change in Income tax portlet
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my Customer has this following ask.

Can we change the date format of fiscal year to 2023-2024, 2022-2023, 2020-2021 instead of 2021,2022, 2023.

Please refer to the screenshot.

Thanks.

entry.title: Story report issue
entry.content:
Hi all,

we meet an issue at existing Story reports for few days: 

We can run story report, but in each component (table) we cant´t see data but only an error

"An error occurred while fetching the list of members."

Do you know what can be a root of this issue a and how to solve it?

Thanks, Míša

entry.title: Is there a guideline from SAP for a uniform/standard naming convention for SAP SuccessFactors?
entry.content:
Hello community ,

Is there a (standard) guideline from SAP on how to best manage naming conventions for SAP SuccessFactors?
I mean for example: modules, objects, fields, rules, roles, groups, etc.?

If not, do you have an example or a hint on how best to proceed here?

Best regards, Ali

@S_Strangfeld  
@StephanieBM01 
@gobind

entry.title: EC UI is displaying the Option ID from a picklist instead of the Label
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In our EC Address portlet, we have a field for 'County'. The County field is linked to a picklist called 'GBR_COUNTY'.  

One of our users can see the Option ID on employees' Address UI instead of the label.

For example, we have a county with the Label 'Greater London' and the Option ID for that is '1060.

Our user is seeing '1060' in the county field on employees' Address UI's.

I have checked Manage Business Configuration and the field is linked to the correct picklist.

I found the SAP KBA below, but the causes of the issue do not apply to us, because we have not migrated or changed the picklist.  

2705217 - Field displaying numerical IDs instead of Picklist labels - Employee Central (sap.com) 

The Label and Option ID in our picklist are shown below:

Only one user has reported this issue.

They have sent us screenshots of the Option ID on the UI. However, when we proxy in as the user, we see the correct label and not the Option ID.

Has anyone experienced this issue? Do you know what could be causing the display of the picklist Option ID instead of the Label (and only for some users)?

Thank you for any advice, much appreciated.

Kind regards

entry.title: Reflecting custom field value from custom object on 'Job Relationship' Portlet during new hiring
entry.content:
Hello All,

We've recently received a business request to automatically reflect the 'HRBP' custom field value, stored against the custom 'Region' foundation object from the 'Job Information' portlet, onto the 'Job Relationship' portlet during the new employee hire page process.

Configured custom object:  

'Job Relationship' portlet from new hire page where the 'HRBP' field and value is supposed to reflect:

Note: The 'Relationship Type' has multiple values derived from Picklist.

We've attempted to address this requirement through an integration job, but have hit some roadblocks along the way. Could anybody lend their expertise and insight please on whether this requirement is achievable on hiring page through an integration job? If so, any guidance on how to proceed would be immensely helpful.

Thank you for your time and support in advance.

Regards,
Aesha

entry.title: Field Visibility in Compensation Portlet
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We have a task for one of my Client.

We have 3-4 fields under Compensation Portlet and this fields visibility depends on another field which is configured under Job Information Portlet.

For e.g Field-A, Field-B, Field-C, Field-D configured under Compensation Portlet and under Job Information there a field called Location Category. If Location Category is USA, then Field-A, Field-B, Field-C, Field-D won't be visible under Compensation Portlet else it will be visible.

I tried to write the rule however its not working but when i create Location Category Field inside Compensation Portlet then its working but Client don't want to fill the Location Category information twice i.e one in Job Information and one in Compensation Portlet.

So is there anyway this can be achieved without creating Location Category field inside Compensation Portlet

Please suggest a workaround

Thanks

Rashmi

entry.title: Higher level position and head of department
entry.content:
Hello experts,

My current client is interested in understanding how other companies handle higher-level positions and department heads.

In their organization, all managers must serve as department heads, but I would assume this is very much company specific and depend on the internal company structure? I'd love to hear your thoughts and experiences on this matter.

Thank you for your input!

Best regards, Ines

entry.title: Display Options on Position Org Chart (Employee Central)
entry.content:
I see the Display Options for Position Org Chart include the options of Child Positions, Matrix Positions, Show Inactive Positions. Does anyone know if there is a way to just to display Positions by the To Be Hired setting? In large groups, it is challenging to see visually which positions are vacant especially when researching for reqs to be opened.

I also made an attempt to look through the improvement request list, but could not seem to find one that was similar to this request.

Thoughts?

entry.title: Birthday email not triggering for few employees
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has the following ask to trigger birthday mail for employees. So we followed Birthday and Anniversary alerts to the employees in SuccessFactors | SAP Blogs  KBA to replicate the same.

But, For test employees only birthday mail is triggering on their birthday but for real time employees it is not triggering. For example- Test rubina(employee id-1)'s  & HI7173's birthday is on 17 january. But the birthday mail is triggering to Rubina where for HI7173 it is not triggering.

Attaching the replication steps. 

Replication steps-

Create an MDF object named 'cust_birthday'.

 

 

Birthday rule

 

 

Alert MDF Birthday rule

 

 

Birthday WF

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Alert message birthday

 

 

Integration

 

Please check. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Vacancy of field to get shown in picklist as grey out
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has this following ask.

Is it feasible to Grey out the value in picklist which all are used by some employee. For example- if company has assigned "Flat no-203" to one employee, then for others the "203" flat should get greyout.

Please let us know the feasibility.

entry.title: Quarter Allotment MDF
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has this following ask.

Inside quarter allotment MDF we have a field called Permanent and temporary. The requirement here is if we are selecting Permanent then in Compensation Information portlet(Standard portlet) HRA (Pay component) won't be visible.

We tried to achieve through rule but it is not working. Is it feasible ?

entry.title: Can we assign two matrix manager to a single employee in system
entry.content:
Hi Community,

One of my customer has this following ask.

Can we assign two matrix manager to a single employee in system. For example- now we only can assign one matrix manager to a employee so in system he will get shown as dotted line manager for the employee in system. Can we assign two dotted line manager?

 

Please let us know the feasibility.

entry.title: Emergency contact tracking
entry.content: Hello Experts - I have a business requirement that is asking for current staff to view and 'sign-off' that they have a current emergency contact. Has anyone been asked of this? Any ideas for an easy way to accomplish? Thank you!

entry.title: Has anyone pulled in performance data or data from other modules into EC workflows?
entry.content: The only way i can think of doing this would be to add a custom field to the comp portlet and then have it populated annually. Can anyone think of another way which doesn't involve adding a custom field in EC?

entry.title: Department to Department via Parent Hierarchy
entry.content: We have a Parent Child Department Hierarchy. In addition, Department is also associated with Legal Entity, Business Unit and Division objects via one-to-one relationship. If there is a change at the Department record, like changing the Business Unit of one Department, will it be possible to reflect this change in all of its child Departments such that the child departments also reflects the updated Business Unit. Please advise how it can be achieved If at all its possible.

entry.title: Can the higher level position update on position edit the existing record in incumbents Job Info
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When the higher level position is updated on position, its standard behavior that it will create a new record on incumbents job info for supervisor change.

Is there a way to make the system not create a new record but edit/update the existing record on incumbents job info? Can the behavior be tweaked such that a new record is not created on job info?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Warning message when deleting dependent information r...
entry.content:
Hi Suraj,

Have you found a solution for this?

I am facing the exact same requirement but haven't found a suitable solution

entry.title: How to fetch Deleted records from Background elements?
entry.content:
Gosh. It's been quite a while since I posted anything here! Anyway.

I am working on a requirement with my client to push delta Changes and Deletions from background portlets in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central# like Languages, inside work experience, Industry etc to a destination system. Unfortunately, SFAPI pertaining specifically to non-Compound Employee calls, does not support period Delta. Using period delta, I can get the deletions for non-effective dated portlets but not background elements. 

Any thoughts on how I can resolve this?

Thanks

Kriba

entry.title: SuccessFactors and Active Directory Integration
entry.content:
Hi all,

We are in the very beginning of integrating SuccessFactors and Active Directory, and I need some clarity on a few things. Hope someone can help. 

1. As I've seen in previous projects, it is not before the employee is hired in EC and sent to AD, that the username and business email address is generated.

So how is the username normally created in AD (and sent back to SF)? Is the username created based on attributes such as first name and last name in SuccessFactors? 

2. If an employee change last name, would we expect the email address to change automatically? Meaning, change is triggered from SF to AD and back to SF? I would believe no, because of lisences? But if a change must be done, would we then do the email adress change directly in AD?

I guess what I am really after, is some general information on how username and business email process would look like with SF-AD provisioning enabled.

All answers appreciated.

Thanks!

Br,

Ines
